properties.remark: MULTIPLE TREES DOWN THROUGHOUT TOWN.
LIVE TREE SNAPPED OFF 15 FT ABOVE GROUND WITH A 2 FT DIAMETER AT THE BREAKING POINT.
TREE BRANCHES 2INCHES IN DIAMETER BROKEN OFF TREES, BRANCHES STRIPPED OF LEAVES.
LARGE TREES DOWN IN THE UNIVERSITY DISTRICT AND ALONG DALY AVENUE.
POWER LINES DOWN ACROSS MULLAN ROAD.
VERY LARGE UPROOTED TREES.
HAIL BEGAN AT 11:45PM MDT, LASTED 10 MINUTES; QUARTER-SIZE HAIL FELL IN LAST FEW MINUTES OF EVENT. HAIL DURATION 2 MINUTES
ROOF DAMAGE TO HOUSE AND EXTENSIVE DAMAGE TO CAMPER. HAIL DURATION 10 MINUTES

MULTIPLE LARGE LODGEPOLE PINETREES BLOWN DOWN. TREES ESTIMATED TO BE ABOUT 50 TO 80 FEET TALL AND 8-10 INCHES IN DIAMETER. ONE TREE DOWN ON A NEIGHBORING HOME BUT NO SIGNIFICANT DAMAGE. NO ESTIMATE ON THE WIND SPEEDS.
MULTIPLE TREES DOWN IN SEELEY LAKE AREA. RESULTED IN A PROPANE FIRE AT ONE HOUSE. ONE SINGLE FAMILY HOME DESTROYED.
GNP DISPATCH REPORTED TREES DOWN EVERYWHERE IN THE APGAR/LAKE MCDONALD AREA. SOME WERE LARGE SO A SAW CREW WAS CALLED FOR DISPOSAL.
ESTIAMTED LARGE MARBLE OR QUARTER SIZED HAIL.
QUARTER SIZED HAIL AT NATIONAL BISON RANGE
FOREST LITTERED WITH SMALL BRANCHES & LEAVES. AMOUNT OF HAIL TURNED GROUND OF FOREST WHITE.
24 INCH DIAMETER TREE BLOWN OVER ON CAMPER
WINDS ESTIMATED AT 60 MPH. MULTIPLE TREES DOWN. ONE TREE FELL ON A TRUCK. STEEL WAS BLOWN OFF A HANGAR.
DEPTH WAS 1 INCH.
30 FOOT TALL WILLOW TREE BLOWN DOWN.
HAIL ACCUMULATED TO 12 INCHES. HAIL STRIPPED TREE LEAVES. SPOTTER WILL BE SENDING PHOTOS.
BUSINESS PROPERTY DAMAGE.
DAMAGE TO GARDEN.
SEVERAL VEHICLES WERE DAMAGED BY HAIL.
BARN WAS TOTALED BY STRONG WIND. ALSO SEVERAL TREES WERE UPROOTED WHILE SOME WERE BROKEN IN HALF. ONE COTTONWOOD TREE, APPROX. 24 INCHES IN DIAMETER WAS UPROOTED.
HAIL BROKE ALL PORCH WINDOWS ON THE EAST SIDE OF THE HOUSE. HAIL COVERED THE GROUND. HAIL DURATION 8 MINUTES
FOUR TO FIVE FOOT TALL HAY CROP DECIMATED BY HAIL.
MESONET STATION LEODORE CREEK /LDOI1/ ELEVATION 6000 FEET.
TREES DOWN ON ROADWAYS AND ON PROPERTIES. POWER OUTAGES AS WELL.
TREES DOWN OVER ROADWAYS AND ON PROPERTIES. PWER OUTAGES. 50MPH WINDS AS WELL. HAIL DURATION NAN MINUTES
POWER LINES ARE DOWN IN 3 DIFFERENT AREAS. A LIGHTNING STRIKE STARTED A NEW FIRE. ALSO A ROOF OVER A PATIO BLEW OFF.
A MICROBURST WITH ESTIMATED 60MPH WINDS BLEW DOWN 20+ TREES AROUND CREWS ON THE GOLD PAN FIRE. TREES BLOCKED ROADS AND CREWS HAD TO USE CHAINSAWS TO GET OUT OF THE AREA.
FOUR COTTONWOOD LIMBS TWELVE INCHES IN DIAMETER WERE DOWN. TSTM WND GST DURATION 10 MINUTES
HUNDREDS OF REPORTS OF TREES AND POWERLINES DOWN ALL AROUND THE MISSOULA AREA
MULTIPLE POWER LINES DOWN AROUND TOWN
HUNDREDS OF POWERLINES AND TREES DOWN ALL AROUND THE CLINTON AREA.

AN ESTIMATED 5 FOOT WALL OF FAST MOVING WATER MOVED THROUGH A CANYON NEAR A RANCH. THE WATER COMBINED WITH PEA SIZED HAIL SEVERLY DAMAGED GRAIN, ALFALFA & TWISTED SEVERAL LARGE METAL SPRINKLERS. DOPPLER RADAR RAINFALL ESTIMATES WERE NEAR 1 INCH IN ONE HOUR HERE. THEY MENTIONED THIS WAS THE WORST FLOODING IN 20 YEARS.
